title: Anantham Anantham Padum Female Song Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
anantham anantham padum
manam aasaiyin oonjalil aadum
aayiram aayiram kaalam
indha niyabagam
poo mazhai thoovum

kaatrinil saaral
pola paaduven.
pookkalil thendral
pola  thaeduven.

nee varum paadhaiyil
kangalal thavam iruppen (2)

anantham anantham padum
manam aasaiyin oonjalil aadum
aayiram aayiram kaalam
indha niyabagam
poo mazhai thoovum

unnai paartha naalilthaan
kannil paarvai thondriyadhu
undhan perai sollithaan
endhan baashai thondriyadhu

unnai moodi vaikathaan
kannil imaigal thondriyadhu
unnai soodi paarkathaan
pookkal maalai aagiyadhu

nee ennai serndhidum varaiyil
idhayathil swasangal illai
nee vandhu thangiya nenjil
yaarukkum idame illai

paarthu paarthu yaengiya
sondham vaasalil
vandhu serndhadhe

anantham anantham padum
manam aasaiyin oonjalil aadum
aayiram aayiram kaalam
indha niyabagam
poo mazhai thoovum

unnai neengi ennaalum
endhan jeevan vazhaadhu
undhan anbil vazhvatharku
jenmam ondru podhaadhu

unnai ennum ullathil
veru ennam thondraadhu
kaatru nindru ponaalum
kadhal nindru pogaadhu

engengo thaediya vazhvai
un sondham thandhadhu ingae
sandhangal thaediya vaarthai
sangeetham aanathu ingae.

aasai kadhal kaigalil
serndhaal vazhve
sorgam aagume.

anantham anantham padum
manam aasaiyin oonjalil aadum

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of the Tamil melody Anantham Anantham from the classic movie Poove Unakkaga. Composed by the legendary S.A. Rajkumar, this song captures the essence of love and nostalgia. Immerse yourself in its soothing tunes and relive the golden era of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Blissful, blissful, the heart sings, swaying on the swing of desire. For thousands and thousands of moments, this memory showers like a rain of flowers.
I will sing like the drizzle in the breeze. I will search like the gentle wind among flowers.
On the path you walk, I will wait with my eyes in meditation.
Blissful, blissful, the heart sings, swaying on the swing of desire. For thousands and thousands of moments, this memory showers like a rain of flowers.
On the day I saw you, vision appeared in my eyes. By uttering your name, my language found its voice.
To close you within, my eyelids appeared. To adorn you and see, flowers became garlands.
Until you join me, my heart has no breath. Once you reside in my heart, there is no space for anyone else.
The bond that longed and longed has reached the doorstep.
Blissful, blissful, the heart sings, swaying on the swing of desire. For thousands and thousands of moments, this memory showers like a rain of flowers.
Separated from you, my life cannot thrive. One lifetime is not enough to live in your love.
With you in my heart, no other thought arises. Even if the wind stops, love will not cease.
The life I searched for everywhere, your bond has given me here. The words I sought in arguments have turned into music here.
When desire and love join hands, life becomes heaven.
Blissful, blissful, the heart sings, swaying on the swing of desire.
